fields.description: Master switch for the */15 SO→DN release job. OFF = fully manual.
fields.label: Release Job Enabled

fields.description: Download + attach ClickPost label PDFs to submitted D2C DNs (*/15).
fields.label: Label Fetch Enabled

fields.description: Auto-create the SHPSI27 the moment a deferred DN's label is fetched (invoice-on-label). Off = invoice only via the manual D2C Invoice Run screen.
fields.label: Auto Invoice On Label Fetch
Auto Fulfill On Shopify
fields.description: Push AWB + tracking to Shopify (mark fulfilled) for the automation's deferred DNs. Replaces the broken 'Auto Sync AWB to Shopify' server script.

fields.label: Label/Fulfill Batch Size
fields.description: Max deferred DNs the label-fetch job processes per */15 run (each does Shopify + ClickPost HTTP + SI submit). Keep well below release_batch_size so a run stays inside the scheduler time budget.

fields.label: Label Run Time Budget (sec)
fields.description: Wall-clock ceiling for one label-fetch run; it stops early and finishes the rest next run. Stay under the RQ job timeout.

fields.label: ClickPost API Key
fields.description: Key for the ClickPost fetch-by-AWB label API (couriers like Shadowfax that don't write the label URL to the DN). Set on each site; not stored in code.

fields.label: Courier cp_id Map (JSON)
fields.description: courier(lowercase) -> ClickPost cp_id. Unknown couriers are auto-discovered and cached here.
When ON, the release job selects + logs eligible orders but creates NO Delivery Notes. Turn OFF to go live.
fields.label: Dry Run (select only, no DN)

fields.description: Only release orders whose every line has physical stock (actual_qty) at the source warehouse.
fields.label: Require Stock

fields.description: OFF (default) = PPCOD (partial-prepaid COD) orders are NOT released — they stay on the manual sheet flow (Phase-1 scope decision, 2026-07-12). ON = release PPCOD normally; the DN COD Guard auto-syncs the COD collect-amount onto the DN.
fields.label: Release PPCOD Orders
Release Known Multi-box Combos
fields.description: Phase 1: auto-release multi-box orders whose 2-box split is a known combo the ClickPost script already handles (SOL-AFO-501-JUC-121). All other multi-box stays on the sheet. The AWB guard backstops it.
If ON, the release job stops creating DNs once the daily cutoff hour is reached (orders roll to next day). Default OFF = ship immediately.
fields.label: Enforce Cutoff On Release

fields.description: Daily batch cutoff hour (24h, IST). 16 = 4 PM.
fields.label: Cutoff Hour

fields.description: Sales Order name prefix to scope selection (Shopify D2C = SHP).
fields.label: SO Series Prefix

fields.description: How many days back to consider Sales Orders (by transaction_date).
fields.label: Lookback Days

fields.description: Max candidate SOs pulled per */15 run.
fields.label: Release Batch Size

fields.description: Hard safety cap on DNs actually created per run.
fields.label: Max Orders Per Run

fields.description: JSON map: SKU → boxes shipped per unit. 0 = nestable accessory (packs inside the parent box, e.g. spatula/recipe book/silicone basket), 1 = own box, 2+ = true multi-box combo (e.g. AFO+juicer). Unknown SKUs default to 1. Orders releasing via Phase 1 must total exactly 1 box (qty counts: 2× airfryer = 2 boxes → excluded). Example: {"SOL-AFO-501-JUC-121": 2, "SOL-CKW-WSPA-101": 0, "SOL-AF-RCP-101": 0}
fields.label: SKU Box Config (JSON)
Combinable Categories
fields.description: Categories whose items STACK into one carton when bought together (one per line). Same-category multi-piece orders in these categories are treated as a SINGLE box. Appliances must NOT be listed here. SKU->category source = app combinable_categories.json map.

fields.label: Combine Piece Cap
fields.description: Max pieces of one combinable category per carton before it splits into another box (weight/size guard). Validated: cookware ships single-AWB up to 6 pieces. 0 = use default (6).

fields.label: Max Order Lines (Phase 1)
fields.description: Orders with more distinct item lines than this are too complex to trust single-box stacking and stay on the manual sheet (jumbo guard). 0 = use default (6).
Run the release job once now (respects Dry Run + gates).
fields.label: Run Release Now

fields.description: Build today's pick list + combined labels PDF.
fields.label: Prepare Today's Shipments
Scheduled Prepare Waves
fields.description: Auto-run Prepare Today's Shipments at the wave hours below (pick list + labels per wave). Ad-hoc Prepare still works anytime.

fields.label: Wave Hours (24h, comma-separated)
fields.description: Site-timezone hours at which a wave fires, e.g. 9,12,15. A wave only creates a batch if there are new unbatched orders.

fields.label: Prepare Lookback (days)
fields.description: Prepare covers unbatched D2C DNs from this many days back through today — so overnight releases (posted yesterday, after the last wave) roll into the morning wave instead of stranding.

fields.label: Batch Email Recipients
fields.description: Comma/newline separated emails. Every Prepare run that creates a batch (wave or ad-hoc) emails them the pick list + labels PDFs. Empty = no email.

fields.label: Push Ops Sheet
fields.description: Every 30 min, push Run Log + Exceptions + Auto-Shipped tabs to the Google Sheet below (server-side). Requires the service-account key in site config (ops_sheet_sa_key) — NOT stored in any doctype.

fields.label: Ops Sheet ID
fields.description: Google Sheet id (from its URL). Share the sheet as Editor with the service-account email.
